people.name: Sofia
people.text: I love spending time outdoors. At the weekend I usually go cycling with my dad. I am also in the school swimming team and we train three times a week. I do not play team sports because I prefer individual activities where I can focus on my own performance.

people.name: Marco
people.text: Sport is important to me but I like being part of a group. I play basketball for my school and we have matches every Saturday. I also enjoy watching live football games with my friends. I am not very good at water sports but I would like to try them one day.

people.name: Priya
people.text: I enjoy creative hobbies more than sport. I paint and draw in my free time, and I have joined the school art club. I am also learning to play the violin. I do some sport at school because it is compulsory, but I would rather do something artistic.

questions.prompt: Who is a member of a school sports team?
questions.rationale: Sofia is in the school swimming team.

questions.prompt: Who prefers activities where they work alone?
questions.rationale: Sofia prefers individual activities.

questions.prompt: Who enjoys watching sport as well as playing it?
questions.rationale: Marco watches live football games.

questions.prompt: Who plays a musical instrument?
questions.rationale: Priya is learning the violin.

questions.prompt: Who would like to try a new sport in the future?
questions.rationale: Marco says he would like to try water sports one day.

questions.prompt: Who does sport only because they have to?
questions.rationale: Priya does sport because it is compulsory.

questions.prompt: Who takes part in a weekend sports competition?
questions.rationale: Marco has basketball matches every Saturday.

people.name: Lucas
people.text: I spend a lot of time online. I enjoy playing video games with friends from other countries. I also make short videos about technology and post them on the internet. My parents think I spend too much time on screens, but I think it is a useful skill for the future.

people.name: Aisha
people.text: I am very interested in nature and the environment. I joined a local group that plants trees and cleans up parks. Every month we work together to make our neighbourhood cleaner. I also grow vegetables in our garden at home. I want to study biology at university.

people.name: Tom
people.text: I love cooking and trying food from different countries. At home I help my parents prepare dinner and I have even invented some of my own recipes. I watch cooking programmes on TV and learn new techniques. I think I would like to work in a restaurant when I am older.

questions.prompt: Who has contact with people from other countries through a hobby?
questions.rationale: Lucas plays video games with friends from other countries.

questions.prompt: Who creates content and shares it online?
questions.rationale: Lucas makes videos and posts them on the internet.

questions.prompt: Who works with other people to help the local area?
questions.rationale: Aisha joins a group that plants trees and cleans parks.

questions.prompt: Who has a hobby that they do at home in the garden?
questions.rationale: Aisha grows vegetables in the garden at home.

questions.prompt: Who has a hobby they would like to turn into a career?
questions.rationale: Tom wants to work in a restaurant.

questions.prompt: Who learns from watching television?
questions.rationale: Tom watches cooking programmes and learns new techniques.

questions.prompt: Who has parents who are not happy about a hobby?
questions.rationale: Lucas's parents think he spends too much time on screens.

people.name: Emma
people.text: I read a lot in my free time. I prefer adventure and mystery stories. I am part of a reading club at school where we discuss books once a month. I am also trying to write my own story. I find it difficult but very interesting. I read at least 30 minutes every night before I go to sleep.

people.name: Yusuf
people.text: I am very into music. I play the drums in a band with three friends. We practise in my garage every weekend and hope to play at the school event next term. I listen to all types of music but I like rock the best. I am also learning music production on my computer.

people.name: Nina
people.text: I love fashion and design. I make my own clothes and accessories at home. I take photos of my designs and put them on social media where I have many followers. I want to study fashion design after school. I also help decorate the school for special events.

questions.prompt: Who is trying to make something creative for the first time?
questions.rationale: Emma is trying to write her own story for the first time.

questions.prompt: Who is part of a group that meets regularly to discuss a hobby?
questions.rationale: Emma is in a reading club that meets monthly.

questions.prompt: Who performs with other people as a group?
questions.rationale: Yusuf plays in a band with friends.

questions.prompt: Who hopes to share their hobby with the school community soon?
questions.rationale: Yusuf hopes to play at the school event next term.

questions.prompt: Who has many people following their work online?
questions.rationale: Nina has many followers on social media.

questions.prompt: Who helps with decorating at school events?
questions.rationale: Nina helps decorate the school for special events.

questions.prompt: Who does their hobby every day?
questions.rationale: Emma reads at least 30 minutes every night.

people.name: Mia
people.text: I enjoy travelling with my family. Every summer we visit a different country. I keep a travel journal where I write about the places I visit and the people I meet. Learning about different cultures is my favourite thing. I have visited twelve countries so far and I want to visit more.

people.name: Jack
people.text: I am very interested in space and science. I read books and watch documentaries about planets and the universe. I have a telescope that I use on clear nights. I want to become an astronaut or a scientist. I also go to a science club at school every Thursday.

people.name: Lily
people.text: I care a lot about animals. I volunteer at a local animal shelter at weekends. I help feed and look after dogs and cats that need a home. I also do a lot of research about animal behaviour because I want to become a vet. I have three pets at home.

questions.prompt: Who keeps a written record of their experiences?
questions.rationale: Mia keeps a travel journal.

questions.prompt: Who has already done their hobby in many different places?
questions.rationale: Mia has visited twelve countries.

questions.prompt: Who uses equipment to explore their hobby?
questions.rationale: Jack uses a telescope to look at the sky.

questions.prompt: Who attends a club at school related to their interest?
questions.rationale: Jack goes to a science club at school on Thursdays.

questions.prompt: Who gives their free time to help others?
questions.rationale: Lily volunteers at an animal shelter.

questions.prompt: Who wants a career connected to their hobby?
questions.rationale: Lily wants to become a vet.

questions.prompt: Who is interested in learning about how other people live?
questions.rationale: Mia says learning about different cultures is her favourite thing.

people.name: Carlos
people.text: I enjoy photography. I take photos of my city, especially old buildings and busy street markets. I have entered two photo competitions at school and won one of them. My photos are on the school website. I hope to study photography at art school when I finish school.

people.name: Zoe
people.text: I am really into languages. I can speak three languages and I am learning a fourth one online. I enjoy watching films in other languages to improve. I also have a pen pal in Japan and we write to each other every month. I love the idea of working as a translator one day.

people.name: Leo
people.text: My hobby is skateboarding. I practise tricks in the park near my house with a group of friends. We also watch online videos of professional skateboarders to learn new techniques. I have hurt myself a few times, but I still enjoy it. I am saving up to buy better equipment.

questions.prompt: Who has won a prize for their hobby?
questions.rationale: Carlos won one of two photo competitions.

questions.prompt: Who wants a career connected to communication in other languages?
questions.rationale: Zoe wants to work as a translator.

questions.prompt: Who has a regular written contact with someone from another country?
questions.rationale: Zoe has a pen pal in Japan and they write each month.

questions.prompt: Who learns new skills by watching videos online?
questions.rationale: Leo watches online videos of professional skateboarders.

questions.prompt: Who practises their hobby with a group of friends?
questions.rationale: Leo skateboards with a group of friends.

questions.prompt: Who has their work shown to other students?
questions.rationale: Carlos's photos are on the school website.

questions.prompt: Who is planning to spend money to improve at their hobby?
questions.rationale: Leo is saving up to buy better equipment.

people.name: Hannah
people.text: I love baking. At weekends I make cakes, biscuits and bread for my family. I find recipes in books and online. Last month I baked a cake for my grandmother's birthday and everyone said it was delicious. I would like to take a proper baking course one day.

people.name: Oliver
people.text: I enjoy making things with my hands. I build models of cars and aeroplanes using kits. I also make things from wood with my grandfather in his workshop. It takes patience but I really enjoy the results. I am making a wooden box for my mum's birthday present.

people.name: Sena
people.text: I am passionate about dancing. I take street dance lessons every Saturday and I also practise at home. My dance group has performed at school events and local festivals. I watch dance shows on TV and try to learn the moves. I hope to join a professional dance company in the future.

questions.prompt: Who has made something for a family member's celebration?
questions.rationale: Hannah baked a cake for her grandmother's birthday.

questions.prompt: Who wants to improve their hobby by studying it formally?
questions.rationale: Hannah wants to take a proper baking course.

questions.prompt: Who does a hobby together with a family member?
questions.rationale: Oliver makes things with his grandfather in the workshop.

questions.prompt: Who is making a present for someone?
questions.rationale: Oliver is making a wooden box for his mum's birthday.

questions.prompt: Who has performed in public more than once?
questions.rationale: Sena's group has performed at school events and local festivals.

questions.prompt: Who hopes to work professionally in their hobby area?
questions.rationale: Sena hopes to join a professional dance company.

questions.prompt: Who tries to learn from watching television?
questions.rationale: Sena watches dance shows on TV and tries to learn the moves.

people.name: Alex
people.text: I am a big fan of board games and strategy games. I play with my family at home and also at a games club at school. I like games that make me think carefully about what to do next. I sometimes watch online videos about game strategies and I have even designed a simple card game myself.

people.name: Fatima
people.text: I love reading about history. I visit museums when I can and I enjoy watching documentaries about past events. I am especially interested in ancient civilisations. I have a collection of books about history. My dream is to become an archaeologist and find ancient objects.

people.name: Sam
people.text: I spend a lot of time drawing. I draw characters and scenes from films and books I like. I put my drawings on the internet and get comments from people all over the world. I am studying art at school and my teacher says I have a lot of talent. I want to work as a graphic designer.

questions.prompt: Who has created their own version of a game?
questions.rationale: Alex has designed a simple card game.

questions.prompt: Who takes part in a club at school related to their hobby?
questions.rationale: Alex is in a games club at school.

questions.prompt: Who visits places connected to their interest?
questions.rationale: Fatima visits museums related to history.

questions.prompt: Who wants to find objects from the past as a career?
questions.rationale: Fatima wants to be an archaeologist and find ancient objects.

questions.prompt: Who receives feedback from people in different countries?
questions.rationale: Sam gets comments from people all over the world online.

questions.prompt: Who has been told by a teacher that they are good at their hobby?
questions.rationale: Sam's art teacher says he has a lot of talent.

questions.prompt: Who watches videos online to improve at their hobby?
questions.rationale: Alex watches online videos about game strategies.

people.name: Isabel
people.text: I love fitness. I go running every morning before school and I do yoga at home in the evenings. I do not belong to a gym but I follow exercise programmes online. My goal is to run a 5 km race next spring. I feel much better and more focused at school since I started this routine.

people.name: David
people.text: I enjoy making music on my computer. I use special software to create beats and mix tracks. I have uploaded some of my music online and people can listen for free. Some of my friends are interested in doing this together and we want to create a music channel online.

people.name: Keiko
people.text: My hobby is learning about astronomy. I read articles and watch videos about stars, galaxies and black holes. I have a small telescope at home that I use at night. I also joined an online community of young astronomers from around the world where we share what we see in the sky.

questions.prompt: Who has a specific future goal connected to their hobby?
questions.rationale: Isabel wants to run a 5 km race next spring.

questions.prompt: Who says their hobby has helped them with schoolwork?
questions.rationale: Isabel says she feels more focused at school since starting her routine.

questions.prompt: Who shares their work online for others to access for free?
questions.rationale: David has uploaded his music and people can listen for free.

questions.prompt: Who plans to do a hobby together with friends in the future?
questions.rationale: David and friends want to create a music channel together.

questions.prompt: Who uses equipment at home to explore a science-related hobby?
questions.rationale: Keiko uses a telescope at home.

questions.prompt: Who is part of an international online community?
questions.rationale: Keiko is in an online community of young astronomers from around the world.

questions.prompt: Who exercises at home without going to a sports centre?
questions.rationale: Isabel does not belong to a gym and follows programmes at home.

people.name: Maria
people.text: I enjoy writing poetry and short stories. I write about things that happen in my life and about nature. I have had one poem published in a local magazine. I also help edit the school newspaper. I find it easier to express my feelings through writing than by talking.

people.name: Ben
people.text: I like doing experiments and building things. I often do science experiments at home using things I find in the kitchen. I am also building a robot from old computer parts. I come first in science class most of the time. I want to study engineering at university.

people.name: Nadia
people.text: My passion is helping other people learn. I started tutoring younger students in maths and English after school. I prepare worksheets and exercises for them. It gives me a great feeling when they improve. I also run a small study group for students who have exams soon.

questions.prompt: Who has published their creative work?
questions.rationale: Maria had a poem published in a local magazine.

questions.prompt: Who works on the school newspaper?
questions.rationale: Maria helps edit the school newspaper.

questions.prompt: Who uses things found at home to practise their hobby?
questions.rationale: Ben does science experiments using things from the kitchen.

questions.prompt: Who is building something from parts they already have?
questions.rationale: Ben is building a robot from old computer parts.

questions.prompt: Who has created materials to help others learn?
questions.rationale: Nadia prepares worksheets and exercises for the students she tutors.

questions.prompt: Who organises extra help for students before exams?
questions.rationale: Nadia runs a study group for students who have exams.

questions.prompt: Who finds writing easier than speaking to express feelings?
questions.rationale: Maria says she finds it easier to express feelings through writing.

people.name: Theo
people.text: I am really into fitness and healthy eating. I track what I eat every day and try to cook healthy meals for myself. I go to the gym three times a week and I am learning about nutrition online. My friends say I am an expert on healthy food already. I want to become a personal trainer.

people.name: Grace
people.text: I love theatre and acting. I have been in three school plays and always play one of the main characters. I practise my lines every evening. I also help younger students with their acting at the school drama club. My dream is to study at a famous drama school.

people.name: Ravi
people.text: I enjoy chess. I am the best player in my school and I have played in regional competitions. My coach says I need to study famous games from the past to improve further. I spend two hours a week training with my coach and I practise online every day.

questions.prompt: Who tracks what they do every day as part of their hobby?
questions.rationale: Theo tracks what he eats every day.

questions.prompt: Who teaches other students something connected to their hobby?
questions.rationale: Grace helps younger students with their acting at drama club.

questions.prompt: Who has played an important role in a school performance?
questions.rationale: Grace always plays one of the main characters in school plays.

questions.prompt: Who has taken part in competitions outside school?
questions.rationale: Ravi has played in regional competitions.

questions.prompt: Who works with a professional to improve their skills?
questions.rationale: Ravi trains with his coach two hours a week.

questions.prompt: Who wants to study a subject related to their hobby at a specialist school?
questions.rationale: Grace wants to study at a famous drama school.

questions.prompt: Who is learning about their hobby topic from the internet?
questions.rationale: Theo is learning about nutrition online.
